ham.subject: Your Order #9876543210 Confirmation – Amazon.in
ham.body:
Hello Suresh,

- 2 x Wireless Mouse – ₹1,200

Suresh Patel
123, Green Street

Thank you for choosing Amazon. Happy shopping!

Best Regards,
